subcodes.first_line: O my Lord, my Hope, my Shield and my Refuge! By Thy might, I have grown weary of beholding mere traces [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ربی و رجائی و حرزی و ملاذی بعزتک قد مللت من مشاهده الاثار
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @firmness in the Covenant, @mystical themes, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa
